title: 终末之诗汉化包
description: 此资源包汉化了原版中没有本地化的终末之诗
body:
# 终末之诗汉化包

## 概述

![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a629fee03ee984ba30f15938a0574d1ba50b85b0.jpeg)

此资源包汉化了原版中没有本地化的终末之诗

此资源包包含了两个版本:
* 原文替换版
* 双语对照版

**原文替换版**: 直接将终末之诗原文替换为翻译后的文本。体验最佳   
**双语对照版**: 同时保留原文与中文翻译，有需要的可选择此版本

*请忽略下载时同时出现Release与Beta版的下载。这仅仅只是为了同时显示原文替换版与双语对照版*

---
---

# End Poem Chinese Version Package

## Overview 

![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a629fee03ee984ba30f15938a0574d1ba50b85b0.jpeg)

This resource package has translated the "End Poem" from the original version which was not localized into Chinese. 

This resource package includes two versions:
* The original text replacement version
* The bilingual comparison version 

**Original text replacement version**: Directly replace the original text of the "End Poem" with the translated text. Enjoy the best experience.   
**Bilingual version**: Also keep the original text and the Chinese translation. This version can be selected if needed.
